subject: TCS: Discretionary deal deferrals intensify; downgrade to Sell, PT ₹3,400
bodyText: We downgrade TCS to Sell with a revised 12-month price target of ₹3,400 (prior ₹3,800). Discretionary deal deferrals are intensifying across BFSI and hi-tech verticals on our channel work, and we see limited scope for a utilization-led margin rescue. Full note attached.
